post.summary: Create API Key Required API Permission: General Configurations
post.description:
Create a new API key for a merchant managed by your affiliate account.
            
Provide the Merchant ID and a name to generate a unique API key ID and secret for the merchant.
            
Use the returned credentials to authenticate as the merchant for API operations.
            
**Note:** The API key secret is only returned once during creation. Store it securely.
            
**Note:** This endpoint requires the Bearer token to be an Affiliate (ISV) token. Merchant tokens are not accepted.

get.summary: Get Transaction. Required API Permission: Pos Get Transaction Details

parameters.name: waitForTransactionProcessing
parameters.description:
Wait for transition to one of completed statuses or timeout happening.
If true - HTTP response will wait till transaction completion/failing/cancelling or timeout.
If false - HTTP response will be returned immediately.
Default value - false

get.summary: Get contact info Required API Permission: General Configurations
get.description:
The "Contact Info" endpoint allows ISV applications to retrieve the merchant's contact information.
By accessing this endpoint, developers can obtain a list of contact info records for the merchant,
including address, phone, etc. This information can be integrated with other endpoints of the application,
such as the invoice creation functionality.

get.summary: Get Terminal Status Required API Permission: Get Terminal Information
get.description:
Retrieve the current status and details of a terminal device.
This endpoint provides the latest available information about a terminal, updated in near real-time.
Depending on the terminal's internet connectivity and operational status, the response may include limited terminal data.

post.summary: Process transaction using unified transaction endpoint

requestBody.description: Transaction request with payment method and transaction type

Create transaction request (Authorizatio.description: Card authorization (pre-auth). Capture later with POST .../transactions/{id}/capture.

Create transaction request (Sale).description: Card sale (auth + capture in one step).

Create transaction response (Authorizati.description: Response after approved authorization (pre-auth). Capture later with POST .../transactions/{id}/capture.

Create transaction response (Sale).description: Response after approved sale (auth + capture in one step).

Create transaction response (ACH).description: Response after approved ACH debit transaction. No AVS.

get.description:
Determines the final amount to be charged considering applicable discounts, tips,
and any Zero Cost Processing (ZCP) mode enabled for the merchant account
(Dual Pricing, Cash Discount, or Credit Card Surcharge).

isFasterProcessing.description:
Enable same-day ACH processing for faster settlement.
Optional - defaults to standard ACH processing if not specified.

requesterIpAddress.description: IP Address - in IPv4 or IPv6 format - of the enduser (customer, operator, or application) that is responsible for submitting the transaction. This is required for audit and fraud-detection purposes.

city.description:
City name.
Alphanumeric and Special Character | Min Length=6 Max Length=128.

countryCode.description: Country code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format (e.g., "US", "CA", "GB").

line1.description:
Address line 1.
Alphanumeric and Special Character | Min Length=6 Max Length=128.

line2.description:
Address line 2.
Alphanumeric and Special Character | Min Length=6 Max Length=128.

postalCode.description:
Postal/ZIP code.
Alphanumeric and Special Character | Min Length=2 Max Length=15.

stateCode.description:
ISO 3166-2 subdivision code.
For US states, the USPS two-letter abbreviation is used (e.g., "NY", "CA", "TX").
See: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-2:US

AddressDto.description:
Address information.
Uses ISO format strings for country and state.

name.description: Display name for the API key

currencyCode.description:
ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., "USD", "EUR", "GBP").
Default: "USD" if not specified.
See: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217

CalculateAmountResponseDto.description: Calculated transaction amounts for different payment methods.

CalculatedAmountDto.description: Amount breakdown for a specific payment method

amount.description:
Amount to capture. When null or omitted, the full authorized amount is captured.
For partial capture, must be greater than 0 and not exceed the remaining authorized amount.

CaptureRequestDto.description:
Capture request.
Omit amount or send empty body for full capture; set Amount for partial capture.

firstName.description: The first name of the customer.

lastName.description: The last name of the customer.

companyName.description: The name of the cardholder's company.

email.description: The email address of the customer.

hasSmsConsent.description: Whether SMS notifications are enabled for the customer.

name.description: Display name for the API key

clientSecret.description: Client secret (only shown once during creation)

hasSmsConsent.description: Whether SMS notifications are enabled for the customer.

shouldUseBillingAsShippingAddress.description: Use billing address as shipping address

posDeviceId.description: External POS Device ID | Mandatory | MaxLength=36

referenceId.description: External Transaction Reference ID | Optional | MaxLength=36

targetTransactionId.description: Transaction Id for Void, Capture, Refund | Conditional

amount.description: Transaction amount | Conditional Required when ```TransactionType``` is: Authorization Sale Capture Refund RefundWORef TipAdjustment

currencyCode.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., "USD", "EUR", "GBP"). Required when ```TransactionType``` is: Authorization Sale Capture Refund RefundWORef TipAdjustment See: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217

paymentProcessorId.description: Set the Payment Processor ID to be used in the transaction. If not provided, it will use the merchant's default processor.

terminalId.description: Terminal ID related to the terminal that will initiate and handle the transaction. Terminal must be in the semi-integrated mode and available (online and ready)

shouldWaitForAcceptanceByTerminal.description:
Set the response mode to short or long polling.


If ```true``` (long polling): HTTP response will be provided once the terminal accepts/declines to initiate the transaction or a timeout happens (terminal does not respond). Follow-up calls to get the POS Transaction By ID should be done to retrieve the latest information of the transaction submission.


If ```false``` (short polling): HTTP response will be returned immediately, while the terminal is still receiving the transaction request. Follow-up calls to get the POS Transaction By ID should be done to retrieve the latest information of the transaction initiation and submission.

shouldRequestPaymentMethodStorageConsent.description: Set to true to show popup about saving customer payment method information on the terminal

currencyCode.description:
ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., "USD", "EUR", "GBP").
Default: "USD" if not specified.
See: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217

customerInitiatedTransaction.description: Indicates if transaction is initiated by customer (CIT) vs merchant (MIT)

deviceId.description: Optional device id from mobile app. When provided and the device has a linked user profile, the transaction is attributed to that user.

appVersion.description: Version of the mobile app used to process the transaction.

sdkVersion.description: Version of the SDK used to process the transaction.

name.description: Display name for the webhook endpoint.

endpointUrl.description: HTTPS callback URL to receive webhook events.

eventTypes.description: Event types to subscribe to. At least one required.

secret.description: HMAC signing secret. Returned only on creation — never shown again.

CreditCardDataDto.description:
Card data for credit operations. Requires raw card details since unreferenced credits
do not support saved payment methods.

CreditDetailsDto.description: Credit payment method details. Exactly one of CardData or AchData must be provided.

currencyCode.description:
ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., "USD", "EUR", "GBP").
Default: "USD" if not specified.
See: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217

CreditRequestDto.description: Request to create an unreferenced credit (card unreferenced refund or ACH credit).

cardNumber.description: The 13-19 digit card number (PAN) used for the transaction.

securityCode.description: The three or four digit security code on the credit card.

expirationMonth.description: The expiration month of the card (2-digit format: 01-12)

expirationYear.description: The expiration year of the card (4-digit format: YYYY)

surchargeRate.description: The percent of transaction amount to be added to Amount after PercentageOffRate is applied.

terminalId.description: ID of terminal that handled the POS Transaction

transactionId.description: ID of attached transaction. Available after processing.

amount.description: Transaction amount for transaction types that require Amount

targetTransactionId.description: Transaction ID for Void, Capture, Refund operations

modifiedOn.description: When the endpoint was last updated.

HoldActionRequestDto.description: Request for ach operations (hold or release hold)

HoldActionResponseDto.description: Response for ACH secondary operations (Hold, Release Hold).

taxRate.description:
Default sale tax rate in percentage. Must be between 0% - 22%.
Applicable only for Level 2 AutoFill.

shippingCharge.description: The percentage for shipping or freight charges applied to a product or transaction.

dutyChargeRate.description: Indicates the percentage for any import or export duties included in the order.

id.description: Unique identifier of the settlement batch

paymentProcessorId.description: Payment processor identifier associated with this batch

externalBatchId.description: External batch identifier from the payment processor

batchDateTime.description: Date and time when the batch was created or processed

transactionCount.description: Total number of transactions in the batch

netAmount.description: Net amount after all transactions (sales minus refunds)

refundsAmount.description: Total amount of refunds in the batch

salesAmount.description: Total amount of sales in the batch

terminalId.description: ID of terminal that handled the POS Transaction

transactionId.description: ID of attached transaction. Available after processing.

amount.description: Transaction amount for transaction types that require Amount

targetTransactionId.description: Transaction ID for Void, Capture, Refund operations

merchantId.description: Merchant unique identifier associated with the terminal

merchantCompanyName.description: Company name of the merchant associated with the terminal

ListTerminalsResponseDto.description: Response DTO for a terminal in the list.

data.description: Subscribable webhook event types. System-only events (e.g. ping) are excluded.

city.description:
City name.
Alphanumeric and Special Character | Min Length=6 Max Length=128.

countryCode.description: Country code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format (e.g., "US", "CA", "GB").

line1.description:
Address line 1.
Alphanumeric and Special Character | Min Length=6 Max Length=128.

line2.description:
Address line 2.
Alphanumeric and Special Character | Min Length=6 Max Length=128.

postalCode.description:
Postal/ZIP code.
Alphanumeric and Special Character | Min Length=2 Max Length=15.

stateCode.description:
ISO 3166-2 subdivision code.
For US states, the USPS two-letter abbreviation is used (e.g., "NY", "CA", "TX").
See: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-2:US

id.description: Unique identifier of the contact information record

addressName.description: Name or label of the address

isMainAddress.description: Whether this is the main address

isDefaultAddress.description: Whether this is the default address

isCustomerCardSavingByTerminalEnabled.description: Whether terminal can save customer card after transaction

ttpIosTerminalProfileId.description: Tap to Pay Terminal Profile Id for iOS devices

PaymentConfigurationResponseDto.description: Payment configuration settings for the merchant

cardNumber.description: The 13-19 digit card number (PAN) used for the transaction.

securityCode.description: The three or four digit security code on the credit card.

expirationMonth.description: The expiration month of the card (2-digit format: 01-12)

expirationYear.description: The expiration year of the card (4-digit format: YYYY)

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default payment processor

success.description: Whether the ping was delivered successfully (2xx response).

statusCode.description: HTTP status code returned by the endpoint, if available.

terminalId.description:
Terminal ID from the terminal that will initiate and handle the transaction receipt print request.
Terminal must be in the semi-integrated mode and available (online and ready).

code.description: The merchant assigned unique product identification code.

unitPrice.description: The unit price for the product.

measurementUnit.description: The unit of measurement for the product.

ResponseDetailsDto.description: Response details for Declined or Failed transactions

ReversalOperationResponseDto.description:
Shared response for reversal and credit operations.
Used by POST /v2/transactions/{transactionId}/reversal (card void, card refund, ACH void, ACH refund)
and POST /v2/transactions/credit (card unreferenced refund, ACH credit).
Slim DTO focused on the operation result — no AmountDetails breakdown, AvsResponse, or Receipt.

amount.description:
Amount to refund. Optional — for partial card refunds only.
When null or omitted, the full transaction amount is refunded.
Ignored for void operations and ACH refunds.

ReversalRequestDto.description:
Request to reverse a transaction. The backend automatically determines
whether to void or refund based on the transaction's settlement status.

customerConsent.description: Whether the customer has consented to receive the SMS

SendReceiptRequestDto.description: Request to send a transaction receipt by SMS.

paymentProcessorId.description: The payment processor ID to settle transactions for

SettleTransactionsRequestDto.description: Request to settle (close) a batch of transactions for a given payment processor

message.description: Descriptive message about the settlement result

processorResponseCode.description: Response code from the payment processor

SettleTransactionsResponseDto.description: Response after settling (closing) a batch of transactions

hours.description: Hours component of the time slot

minutes.description: Minutes component of the time slot

transactionId.description: ID of the transaction to adjust

TipAdjustmentRequestDto.description: Request to adjust the tip amount on a card transaction.

description.description: Description of the AVS result (code description).

TransactionAvsResponseDto.description: Address Verification Service (AVS) response for card payments.

salesTaxRate.description: Sales tax rate. Decimal Number. Max length=4. Allowed characters: 0-9 .(dot) Allowed range: 0.01 - 100

invoiceNumber.description: The Value Added Tax(VAT) invoice number associated with the transaction. Max length=15. Allowed characters: a-z A-Z 0-9 Space

purchaseOrder.description: The value used by the customer to identify an order. Issued by the buyer to the seller. Max length=25. Allowed characters: a-z A-Z 0-9 Space

shippingCharges.description: The dollar amount for shipping or freight charges applied to a product or transaction. Numeric. Max length=12. Allowed characters: 0-9 .(dot)

dutyCharges.description: Indicates the total charges for any import or export duties included in the order. Numeric. Max length=12. Allowed characters: 0-9 .(dot)

products.description: You can send multiple products in a request

TransactionEnhancedDataDto.description:
Combined Level 2 and Level 3 enhanced data for card transactions.
Used for commercial card processing with additional transaction details.

name.description: The name of the product. Alphanumeric and Special Characters. Min Length=1, max length=50. Allowed special characters: Space, Slash /, Hyphen -, Comma

code.description: The merchant's assigned unique product identification code. Alphanumeric and Special Characters. Min length=1, max length=20. Allowed special characters: Space, Slash /

unitPrice.description: The product amount. Numeric. Max length=12. Allowed characters: 0-9 .(dot)

measurementUnit.description: The unit of measurement for the product. Alphanumeric and special character Space. Max length=20

quantity.description: The quantity of a product. Decimal number. Max length=12

taxAmount.description: The tax amount established on a product. Numeric. Max length=12. Allowed characters: 0-9 .(dot)

discountRate.description: The discount percentage applied to a product. Corresponds with productDiscountName. This does not impact transaction functionality. It is used for reporting purposes. Numeric. Max Length=4. Allowed range:0.01 to 100

description.description: The description of the product. Alphanumeric and Special Characters. Min length=1, max length=200.

TransactionResponseDto.description: Unified transaction response for card and ACH payments.

hasSmsConsent.description: Whether SMS notifications are enabled for the customer.

shouldUseBillingAsShippingAddress.description: Use billing address as shipping address

name.description: Display name for the webhook endpoint.

endpointUrl.description: HTTPS callback URL to receive webhook events.

id.description: Catalog identifier for this event type — matches the underlying enum value.

name.description: Wire-format event type name used in webhook payloads (e.g. "transaction.card.captured").

description.description: Human-readable description of when this event fires.

group.description: Logical grouping for display purposes (e.g. "Card Transactions", "Invoices", "Subscriptions").
